title: Emerging Role of Metabolomics in Ovarian Cancer Diagnosis.
author: Saorin A Di Gregorio E Miolo G Steffan A Corona G
content: S-EPMC7603269 PMC7603269 Emerging Role of Metabolomics in Ovarian Cancer Diagnosis. Ovarian cancer is considered a silent killer due to the lack of clear symptoms and efficient diagnostic tools that often lead to late diagnoses.
